item.description: The United States is firing back against Iran after the deaths of at least three U.S. service members in the Middle East. The American death toll in the war now stands at 17. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: US Fires at Iran After 3 US Service Members Killed in Middle East
media:content.media:description: The United States is firing back against Iran after the deaths of at least three U.S. service members in the Middle East. The American death toll in the war now stands at 17. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY.

item.title: US Fires at Iran After 3 US Service Members Killed in Middle East

item.dc:creator: Daniel Arkin
item.description: Paramount Skydance’s takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery hit a roadblock Monday after a federal judge temporarily paused the proposed merger.

media:content.media:text: Warner Bros. Studios in Burbank, Calif.; Paramount Pictures lot in Los Angeles.
media:content.media:description: Warner Bros. Studios in Burbank, Calif.; Paramount Pictures lot in Los Angeles.

item.title: Judge puts temporary pause on Paramount-Warner merger

item.dc:creator: Berkeley Lovelace Jr.
item.description: Taylor Farms continues to be the subject of a Food and Drug Administration investigation into the growing cyclosporiasis outbreak, despite a false positive test result, the agency said Monday.

media:content.media:text: Cyclosporiasis Outbreak Traced To Iceberg Lettuce From Produce Giant Taylor Farms
media:content.media:description: A Taylor Farms facility in Salinas, Calif., on Friday. Iceberg lettuce from the company's central Mexico facilities has been implicated in the ongoing outbreak.

item.title: FDA says it’s still investigating Taylor Farms in cyclosporiasis outbreak

item.description: Con un hombre más en el campo, el futbolista del FC Barcelona apareció dentro del área y sacó un disparo imparable para el "Dibu" Martínez.

media:content.media:title: Ferran Torres anota el gol que vale un Mundial para España
media:content.media:description: Con un hombre más en el campo, el futbolista del FC Barcelona apareció dentro del área y sacó un disparo imparable para el "Dibu" Martínez.

item.title: Ferran Torres anota el gol que vale un Mundial para España

item.dc:creator: NBC News Digital Art and Photo Department
item.description: A photo gallery of highlights from World Cup 2026.

media:content.media:text: A series of white rings frame a man wearing a red suit coat and blue pants, standing in the crowd during a soccer game
media:content.media:description: Ferran Torres of Spain celebrates after scoring the first and only goal of the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final match against Argentina at New York New Jersey Stadium.

media:content.media:text: A view during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Quarter Final match between France and Morocco.
media:content.media:description: Ferran Torres of Spain celebrates after scoring the first and only goal of the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final match against Argentina at New York New Jersey Stadium.

media:content.media:text: A quad composite of World Cup images.
media:content.media:description: Ferran Torres of Spain celebrates after scoring the first and only goal of the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final match against Argentina at New York New Jersey Stadium.

media:content.media:text: Lionel Messi.
media:content.media:description: Ferran Torres of Spain celebrates after scoring the first and only goal of the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final match against Argentina at New York New Jersey Stadium.

media:content.media:text: Victor Caldas cheers while inside of a prison amongst other inmates
media:content.media:description: Ferran Torres of Spain celebrates after scoring the first and only goal of the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final match against Argentina at New York New Jersey Stadium.

media:content.media:text: A diptych of world cup photos.
media:content.media:description: Ferran Torres of Spain celebrates after scoring the first and only goal of the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final match against Argentina at New York New Jersey Stadium.

media:content.media:text: John TenBrink,Dylan TenBrink
media:content.media:description: Ferran Torres of Spain celebrates after scoring the first and only goal of the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final match against Argentina at New York New Jersey Stadium.

media:content.media:text: Portugal v Croatia: Round of 32 - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Ferran Torres of Spain celebrates after scoring the first and only goal of the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final match against Argentina at New York New Jersey Stadium.

media:content.media:text: Norway fans row during the first half of a FIFA World Cup.
media:content.media:description: Ferran Torres of Spain celebrates after scoring the first and only goal of the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final match against Argentina at New York New Jersey Stadium.

media:content.media:text: A split composite image showing, left, Palestinians watching a unseen screen from a projector outside, and a boy watching a soccer match from a laptop as people sleep on sleeping bags around him inside of a shelter
media:content.media:description: Ferran Torres of Spain celebrates after scoring the first and only goal of the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final match against Argentina at New York New Jersey Stadium.

media:content.media:text: On-field action during the world cup final match.

media:content.media:text: Soccer fans at an outdoor watch party during the world cup/

media:content.media:text: Kylian Mbappe #10 of France celebrates scoring his team's first goal.
media:content.media:description: Ferran Torres of Spain celebrates after scoring the first and only goal of the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final match against Argentina at New York New Jersey Stadium.

media:content.media:text: Erling Braut Haaland.
media:content.media:description: Ferran Torres of Spain celebrates after scoring the first and only goal of the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final match against Argentina at New York New Jersey Stadium.

media:content.media:text: A split composite image showing two people kissing as white particles fall, left, and Jan Paul Hecke and Ismael Saibari looking into each other's eyes as their noses touch
media:content.media:description: Ferran Torres of Spain celebrates after scoring the first and only goal of the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final match against Argentina at New York New Jersey Stadium.

media:content.media:text: Guillermo Ochoa #13 of Mexico is tossed into the air by his teammates after the team's 3-0 victory.
media:content.media:description: Ferran Torres of Spain celebrates after scoring the first and only goal of the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final match against Argentina at New York New Jersey Stadium.

media:content.media:text: APTOPIX Bosnia US WCup Soccer
media:content.media:description: Ferran Torres of Spain celebrates after scoring the first and only goal of the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final match against Argentina at New York New Jersey Stadium.

media:content.media:text: Harry Kane consoles Jude Bellingham.

media:content.media:text: Scotland fans.

media:content.media:text: Lamine Yamal, back to camera, stands and prays on the soccer field

item.title: A look at the most exciting moments from the 2026 FIFA World Cup

item.dc:creator: Rohan Nadkarni
item.description: The 2026 World Cup was an undeniable sensation in the United States, setting records for television ratings while millions of fans piled into stadiums to take in all the action.

media:content.media:text: Members of the Tartan Army.
media:content.media:description: Members of the Tartan Army in Boston on June 14.

item.title: The soccer fans who fell in love with America during the World Cup

item.description: Andy Burnham was formally appointed the newest British prime minster, the seventh to take up the position in the last decade. NBC News’ Raf Sanchez reports on how Burnham differs from outgoing prime minster Keir Starmer and his meeting with King Charles III.

media:content.media:title: Andy Burnham formally appointed U.K. prime minster
media:content.media:description: Andy Burnham was formally appointed the newest British prime minster, the seventh to take up the position in the last decade. NBC News’ Raf Sanchez reports on how Burnham differs from outgoing prime minster Keir Starmer and his meeting with King Charles III.

item.title: Andy Burnham formally appointed U.K. prime minster

item.dc:creator: Aaron Gilchrist
Rebecca Cohen
item.description: OCEAN SPRINGS, Miss. — Nolan Wells, the Mississippi teenager whose death after a Fourth of July boating trip with friends has spurred national attention, was remembered Monday as a “gentle, calming spirit” during a funeral that attracted hundreds.

media:content.media:text: Christine Wonsley,Elmore Wonsley,Elmore Wonsley Jr. Ethan Wonsley
media:content.media:description: Christine Wonsley cries next to her Husband Elmore, and their sons Elmore Jr. and Ethan, during a memorial service for her son Nolan Xavier Wells on Monday, July 20, 2026, in Ocean Springs, Miss.

media:content.media:text: Christine Wonsley,Elmore Wonsley,Ben Crump,Al Sharpton
media:content.media:description: Christine Wonsley, center, is flanked by her husband Elmore, second from left, attorney Ben Crump, left, and Rev, Al Sharpton during the memorial service.

media:content.media:text: Nolan Wells Funeral
media:content.media:description: Football teammates attend the memorial service.

media:content.media:text: Nolan Wells with his coach, Jake Bramlett.
media:content.media:description: Nolan Wells with his coach, Jake Bramlett.

media:content.media:text: Nolan Wells with his parents.
media:content.media:description: Nolan Wells with his parents.

item.title: Hundreds gather for Nolan Wells’ funeral in Mississippi

item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Chuck
item.description: NBC News is looking to speak with patients, medical providers and healthcare advocates about the changes they are experiencing due to a new Medicaid work mandate.

media:content.media:text: Woman in a blue patient uniform gown sits alone on a bed in a private room and looking out the window in hospital, expressing her concern about the results of an examination. Sad patient and thinking stress anxiety with symptoms of depression and sadness,

item.title: We want to hear how Medicaid work requirements are affecting you

item.dc:creator: Rebecca Shabad
Frank Thorp V
item.description: Sen. Darline Graham, R-S

media:content.media:text: U.S. Sen. Darline Graham Nordone participates in a ceremonial swearing-in in the Old Senate Chamber at the U.S. Capitol.
media:content.media:description: Sen. Darline Graham Nordone, R-S.C., said she will run for a full six-year term to replace her brother, the late Sen. Lindsey Graham.

item.title: Sen. Darline Graham says she is running for a full 6-year term after Trump urged her to jump into the race

item.dc:creator: Berkeley Lovelace Jr.
item.description: Taylor Farms continues to be the subject of a Food and Drug Administration investigation into the growing cyclosporiasis outbreak, despite a false positive test result, the agency said Monday.

media:content.media:text: Cyclosporiasis Outbreak Traced To Iceberg Lettuce From Produce Giant Taylor Farms
media:content.media:description: A Taylor Farms facility in Salinas, Calif., on Friday. Iceberg lettuce from the company's central Mexico facilities has been implicated in the ongoing outbreak.

item.title: FDA says it’s still investigating Taylor Farms in cyclosporiasis outbreak

item.dc:creator: Mark Hodge
item.description: An extra-time goal by Ferran Torres gave the Spaniards their second world title and the first since 2010.

media:content.media:text: Rodri #16 of Spain lifts the FIFA World Cup Winner’s Trophy after the team’s victory following during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final match between Spain and Argentina at New York New Jersey Stadium on July 19, 2026 in East Rutherford, New Jersey.
media:content.media:description: Spain celebrates the team’s victory following during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final match against Argentina at New York New Jersey Stadium on July 19, 2026 in East Rutherford, NJ.

media:content.media:text: Argentina's forward #10 Lionel Messi cries during the trophy ceremony at the end of the 2026 World Cup football tournament final match between Spain and Argentina at the New York/New Jersey Stadium in East Rutherford, NJ.
media:content.media:description: Spain celebrates the team’s victory following during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final match against Argentina at New York New Jersey Stadium on July 19, 2026 in East Rutherford, NJ.

media:content.media:text: Lamine Yamal #19 of Spain is congratulated by Lionel Messi of Argentina after the 1-0 win in the World Cup final on July 19, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Spain celebrates the team’s victory following during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final match against Argentina at New York New Jersey Stadium on July 19, 2026 in East Rutherford, NJ.

media:content.media:text: England's forward #07 Bukayo Saka celebrates scoring his team's fourth goal during the 2026 World Cup football tournament third-place match between France and England at the Miami Stadium in Miami on July 18, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Spain celebrates the team’s victory following during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final match against Argentina at New York New Jersey Stadium on July 19, 2026 in East Rutherford, NJ.

media:content.media:text: Kylian MBAPPE of France during the 2026 FIFA World Cup - 3rd place match between France and England at Hard Rock Stadium on July 18, 2026 in Miami Gardens, Florida.
media:content.media:description: Spain celebrates the team’s victory following during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final match against Argentina at New York New Jersey Stadium on July 19, 2026 in East Rutherford, NJ.

item.title: From The Sports Desk: Spain is the world champion

item.dc:creator: Aaron Gilchrist
Rebecca Cohen
item.description: OCEAN SPRINGS, Miss. — Nolan Wells, the Mississippi teenager whose death after a Fourth of July boating trip with friends has spurred national attention, was remembered Monday as a “gentle, calming spirit” during a funeral that attracted hundreds.

media:content.media:text: Christine Wonsley,Elmore Wonsley,Elmore Wonsley Jr. Ethan Wonsley
media:content.media:description: Christine Wonsley cries next to her Husband Elmore, and their sons Elmore Jr. and Ethan, during a memorial service for her son Nolan Xavier Wells on Monday, July 20, 2026, in Ocean Springs, Miss.

media:content.media:text: Christine Wonsley,Elmore Wonsley,Ben Crump,Al Sharpton
media:content.media:description: Christine Wonsley, center, is flanked by her husband Elmore, second from left, attorney Ben Crump, left, and Rev, Al Sharpton during the memorial service.

media:content.media:text: Nolan Wells Funeral

item.title: Hundreds gather for Nolan Wells’ funeral in Mississippi

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
item.description: I talked with laundry experts to learn how often you should change ans wash your towels and when it’s best to throw them away in exchange for new ones.

media:content.media:text: Towels have a tendency to develop mildew and odors, which is why it’s important to clean them thoroughly.
media:content.media:description: Towels have a tendency to develop mildew and odors, which is why it’s important to clean them thoroughly.

media:content.media:text: Towels have a tendency to develop mildew and odors, which is why it’s important to clean them thoroughly.
media:content.media:description: Towels have a tendency to develop mildew and odors, which is why it’s important to clean them thoroughly.

item.title: Here’s how often you should change your towels, and when to throw them away, according to experts

item.dc:creator: Mili Godio
item.description: Think of exosomes as microscopic delivery trucks that help repair skin tissue, increase collagen and more. I spoke to dermatologists about what exosomes do and how to safely use them.

media:content.media:text: Exosome serums are popping up in popular skin care brands more and more. Whether they’re actually effective depends on how you use them.
media:content.media:description: Exosome serums are popping up in popular skin care brands more and more. Whether they’re actually effective depends on how you use them.

media:content.media:text: Exosome serums are popping up in popular skin care brands more and more. Whether they’re actually effective depends on how you use them.
media:content.media:description: Exosome serums are popping up in popular skin care brands more and more. Whether they’re actually effective depends on how you use them.

item.title: Everyone is talking about exosomes in skin care — here’s why

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: Vets say getting rid of fleas involves three steps: diagnosis, treatment and prevention, and cleaning. Here’s how to complete each one and products to use.

media:content.media:text: It’s ideal to prevent fleas in the first place, but if you’re dealing with an infestation, there are three important steps to follow: diagnosis, treatment and prevention, and cleaning.
media:content.media:description: It’s ideal to prevent fleas in the first place, but if you’re dealing with an infestation, there are three important steps to follow: diagnosis, treatment and prevention, and cleaning.

media:content.media:text: It’s ideal to prevent fleas in the first place, but if you’re dealing with an infestation, there are three important steps to follow: diagnosis, treatment and prevention, and cleaning.
media:content.media:description: It’s ideal to prevent fleas in the first place, but if you’re dealing with an infestation, there are three important steps to follow: diagnosis, treatment and prevention, and cleaning.

item.title: Fleas are every pet parent’s worst nightmare – here’s how to get rid of them

item.dc:creator: Harry Rabinowitz
item.description: The Oura Ring 5 is significantly smaller and slimmer than previous versions. But is it worth the upgrade? I tested it for over a month to find out.

media:content.media:text: The Oura Ring 5 is 40% smaller than the Oura Ring 4, which is noticeable for previous Oura Ring owners.
media:content.media:description: The Oura Ring 5 is 40% smaller than the Oura Ring 4, which is noticeable for previous Oura Ring owners.

media:content.media:text: The Oura Ring 5 is 40% smaller than the Oura Ring 4, which is noticeable for previous Oura Ring owners.
media:content.media:description: The Oura Ring 5 is 40% smaller than the Oura Ring 4, which is noticeable for previous Oura Ring owners.

media:content.media:text: A close up of the Oura Ring 5 and Oura Ring 4 in a person’s hand.
media:content.media:description: The Oura Ring 5 is 40% smaller than the Oura Ring 4, which is noticeable for previous Oura Ring owners.

media:content.media:text: A picture of the writer’s sleep data taken from the Oura Ring 5 compared to data from the Google Fitbit Air.
media:content.media:description: The Oura Ring 5 is 40% smaller than the Oura Ring 4, which is noticeable for previous Oura Ring owners.

media:content.media:text: A video of the symptoms radar feature on the Oura app.
media:content.media:description: The Oura Ring 5 is 40% smaller than the Oura Ring 4, which is noticeable for previous Oura Ring owners.

media:content.media:text: A picture of the writer’s cycling data taken from the Oura Ring 5, comparing a manually logged workout and an automatically detected one.
media:content.media:description: The Oura Ring 5 is 40% smaller than the Oura Ring 4, which is noticeable for previous Oura Ring owners.

item.title: Is the Oura Ring 5 worth it?

item.dc:creator: Rebecca Shabad
Frank Thorp V
item.description: Sen. Darline Graham, R-S

media:content.media:text: U.S. Sen. Darline Graham Nordone participates in a ceremonial swearing-in in the Old Senate Chamber at the U.S. Capitol.
media:content.media:description: Sen. Darline Graham Nordone, R-S.C., said she will run for a full six-year term to replace her brother, the late Sen. Lindsey Graham.

item.title: Sen. Darline Graham says she is running for a full 6-year term after Trump urged her to jump into the race

item.dc:creator: Adela Suliman
item.description: President Trump said the Air Force One plane that was donated by Qatar will be sent away for upgrades, amid swirling concerns about its security features.

media:content.media:text: President Trump Travels To New York For FIFA Reception
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump walks off Air Force One at John F. Kennedy International Airport in New York City on Friday.

item.title: Trump says new Air Force One will be sent away for upgrades, amid security concerns

item.dc:creator: Rebecca Shabad
item.description: Second lady Usha Vance gave birth Sunday to her fourth child, Vice President JD Vance announced on X. “We are excited to announce that our baby boy, Alec Neel Vance, was born this morning,” Vance said in a statement.

media:content.media:text: Second lady Usha Vance and U.S. Vice President JD Vance .
media:content.media:description: Second lady Usha Vance and U.S. Vice President JD Vance arrive for a military mothers celebration in the East Room of the White House on May 6, 2026 in Washington, DC.

item.title: Usha Vance gives birth to fourth child
